name: Qingdao Doublestar Co.,Ltd
summary: Qingdao Doublestar Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells tires in China and internationally. The company is also involved in the research, design, manufacturing, installation, and consultation of casting machinery and equipment, rubber and plastics machinery and equipment, environmental protection machinery, and digital tire molds. In addition, it engages in the real estate business. The company is based in Qingdao, China.
